ab: ma’an kapa’onhaelan Sin ta:in, siya ma’ ’anka SaySiyat a korkoring.
ch: 我的好朋友叫ta:in，他也是賽夏族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is ta:in, and he is also an SaySiyat child.

ch: 我們一起在獅潭部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Sawi’ tribe.

ab: yami rengreng ma’onhael bazae’ noka tatini’ Sipayaka:i’ ka kinbazae’an, yami ra:am a tomal malnoSaySiyat.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說賽夏語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the SaySiyat proficiently.

ab: yako ’ibabaw ma’ kerpe:, ta:in ’irira:i’an ma’ bali’.
ch: 我很高也很胖，ta:in很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while ta:in is short and thin.

ab: ta:in wa’isan, saeboeh ma’ minowa’ hi siya.
ch: ta:in很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: ta:in is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
